text: NEXTSTEP RECYCLING DONATION CENTER NEXTSTEP RECYCLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of computer hardware, household appliances, and scrap metal. 245 Jackson Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 686-2366 .
